title: Update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.47.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | minor | `v1.46.1` -> `v1.47.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.47.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.47.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.46.1...v1.47.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v1.46.1 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1555](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1555)
-   Test helper: add "unshare"/"create-storage-layer"/"storage-layers" by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1562](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1562)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.1.6 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1565](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1565)
-   drivers: chown root mount to root in the userns by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1564](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1564)
-   Split up DeleteContainer by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1568](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1568)
-   Extend driver.ListLayers() by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1563](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1563)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/go-winio to v0.6.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1573](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1573)
-   Don't use bytes.NewBuffer to read data by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1572](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1572)
-   Initial implementation of consistency checks by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1569](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1569)
-   types: try harder to use overlay with rootless by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1571](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1571)
-   store: add support to split filesystem using `imagestore` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1549](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1549)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.16.4 to 1.16.5 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1575](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1575)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec to v1.1.0-rc.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1576](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1576)
-   store,imagestore: treat `graphRoot` as `rwImageStore` to support `Delete` by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1578](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1578)
-   Use Go 1.18 generics in the store’s locking helpers by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1577](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1577)
-   vfs,splitstore: add `graphRoot` as additionalStore by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1580](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1580)
-   pkg/rm: attempt os.RemoveAll() first by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1581](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1581)
-   cirrus: drop debian additional repos by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1585](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1585)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.9.9 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1584](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1584)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.1.7 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1583](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1583)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230426 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1588](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1588)
-   Cirrus: Update fedora name by [@​cevich](https://togithub.com/cevich) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1590](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1590)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.8.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1593](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1593)
-   store: lock additional store before validating image by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1589](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1589)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/pgzip from 1.2.5 to 1.2.6 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1595](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1595)
-   drivers/quota.openDir() log errno if C.opendir() fails by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1594](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1594)
-   Move to golang 1.19 for minimum by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1598](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1598)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sirupsen/logrus to v1.9.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1599](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1599)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sirupsen/logrus to v1.9.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1600](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1600)
-   drivers/overlay.get(): only use the relative workdir for mountOverlayFrom() by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1601](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1601)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230517 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1602](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1602)
-   store: ensure lockfile is updated before writes by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1603](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1603)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/stretchr/testify to v1.8.3 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1605](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1605)
-   Don't silently ignore errors decoding mountpoints.json by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1606](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1606)
-   overlay: set `quota` for imagestore if used by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1609](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1609)
-   Simplify Makefiles, make golangci-lint work again by [@​kolyshkin](https://togithub.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1615](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1615)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/v3 from 3.0.0 to 3.0.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1613](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1613)
-   Fix typo in storage.conf by [@​sstosh](https://togithub.com/sstosh) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1611](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1611)
-   Fail on unmount/rmdir in overlay.Driver.Put by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1607](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1607)
-   .cirrus.yml: fix a warning by [@​kolyshkin](https://togithub.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1616](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1616)
-   options: enable Remap-User/Group setting by [@​sstosh](https://togithub.com/sstosh) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1620](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1620)
-   options: keep using prior drivers if found by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1618](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1618)
-   ci: enable govet and gosimple linters, fix found bugs by [@​kolyshkin](https://togithub.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1621](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1621)
-   Enable gofumpt by [@​kolyshkin](https://togithub.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1617](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1617)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/stretchr/testify to v1.8.4 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1624](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1624)
-   Document stringid.GenerateRandomID() by [@​edsantiago](https://togithub.com/edsantiago) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1625](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1625)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/burntsushi/toml to v1.3.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1626](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1626)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/sirupsen/logrus from 1.9.2 to 1.9.3 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1630](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1630)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/burntsushi/toml to v1.3.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1633](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1633)
-   quota: unlink tmp file before creating it by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1631](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1631)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230601 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1628](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1628)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/burntsushi/toml to v1.3.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1635](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1635)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/BurntSushi/toml from 1.3.1 to 1.3.2 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1634](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1634)
-   Actually correctly fix problems caused by copying `pkg/regexp.Regexp` values by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1636](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1636)
-   types/options: check prior drivers using readdir by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1637](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1637)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec to v1.1.0-rc.3 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1639](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1639)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.9.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1640](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1640)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.16.5 to 1.16.6 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1643](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1643)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.16.6 - autoclosed by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1642](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1642)
-   Audit data flow in applyDiffWithOptions by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1641](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1641)
-   check: suppress certain errors when pull_options might cause them by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1596](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1596)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230614 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1644](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1644)
-   options,rootless: honor `imagestore` from config file by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1645](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1645)
-   chunked: generate tar-split as part of zstd:chunked by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1627](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1627)
-   chunked: include missing package by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1648](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1648)
-   drivers: add EROFS filesystem magic by [@​hsiangkao](https://togithub.com/hsiangkao) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1647](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1647)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​sstosh](https://togithub.com/sstosh) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1611](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1611)
-   [@​edsantiago](https://togithub.com/edsantiago) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1625](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1625)
-   [@​hsiangkao](https://togithub.com/hsiangkao) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1647](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1647)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v0.46.1...v1.47.0

</details>
